name: best-of-n-fix
description: Stage-first best-of-N fix recipe: three isolated delegate attempts in managed worktrees followed by read-only comparison for the runtime task. Human selects; no auto-merge.

tasks.prompt: Implement one minimal solution for the runtime task in this managed worktree only. Keep changes localized. Run safe relevant local checks when practical. Do not merge, push, publish, or deploy. Report changed files, validation, risks, and why this attempt should or should not be selected.

Implement an independent minimal solution for the runtime task in this managed worktree only, using a deliberately different reasonable approach when possible. Keep changes localized. Run safe relevant local checks when practical. Do not merge, push, publish, or deploy. Report changed files, validation, risks, and why this attempt should or should not be selected.

Implement a third conservative minimal solution for the runtime task in this managed worktree only. Prefer the simplest approach you can justify. Run safe relevant local checks when practical. Do not merge, push, publish, or deploy. Report changed files, validation, risks, and why this attempt should or should not be selected.

stages.prompt: Using Source Stage Context and the runtime task, compare the attempt outputs, worktree paths, risks, and validation evidence. Treat attempt outputs as claims, not truth. Recommend at most one option for a human to inspect and merge manually, or recommend no winner if evidence is insufficient or all attempts are risky. Do not merge or modify files.
